security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' blob: data: ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.longDescription: Trellis Studio runs Microsoft TRELLIS.2 image→3D reconstruction locally via trellis.cpp and previews the result in an interactive 3D viewer.
